verses.text: Remember how God led and humbled you these forty years. Remember. Trials prove the heart.
Remember how God led and humbled you these forty years. Remember. Trials prove the heart.
He fed you with manna, that 'man doth not live by bread only.' The lesson. God's word sustains.
He fed you with manna, that 'man doth not live by bread only.' The lesson. God's word sustains.
He fed you with manna, that 'man doth not live by bread only.' The lesson. God's word sustains.
He brings you to a good land of plenty. Good land. God's provision is rich.
He brings you to a good land of plenty. Good land. God's provision is rich.
He brings you to a good land of plenty. Good land. God's provision is rich.
He brings you to a good land of plenty. Good land. God's provision is rich.
When full, bless the LORD; beware forgetting Him. Bless. Gratitude guards the heart.
When full, bless the LORD; beware forgetting Him. Bless. Gratitude guards the heart.
Lest your heart be lifted up, and you forget the LORD. Pride. Plenty can puff up.
Lest your heart be lifted up, and you forget the LORD. Pride. Plenty can puff up.
Lest your heart be lifted up, and you forget the LORD. Pride. Plenty can puff up.
He led you through the great wilderness, giving water and manna. Led. He cared all the way.
He led you through the great wilderness, giving water and manna. Led. He cared all the way.
Say not 'my power gat me this wealth'; God gives the power. His gift. All increase is from Him.
Say not 'my power gat me this wealth'; God gives the power. His gift. All increase is from Him.
If you forget Him and serve idols, you shall surely perish. Warning. Forgetting God is fatal.
If you forget Him and serve idols, you shall surely perish. Warning. Forgetting God is fatal.
